text: Doctor ne phir stress bol kar nikaal diya, par unhe kya pata ki divorcee hone ke baad 'log kya kahenge' wale darr ne meri career ambition ko qaid kar liya hai. Main dobara job shuru karna chahti hoon par Mummy kehti hain ki ghar ki izzat bachane ke liye ab mujhe bas bacchon ki dekhbhaal karni chahiye aur samaj mein shant rehna chahiye. Unka sar neechu na ho, isliye main chupchap unki baat maan kar apne saare sapne daba rahi hoon.

Doctor ko lagta hai ye mamuli stress hai, par unhe nahi dikhta ki ek 'achi bahu' ki image bachane ke liye main apni economic independence ki bali chadha rahi hoon. Sasural wale chahte hain ki main career bhool kar bas ghar sambhalun taaki rishta bana rahe, aur main mana nahi kar sakti kyunki dobara divorce ka stigma parivaar nahi jhel payega. Sabka maan rakhne ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon, chahe andar se main poori tarah toot chuki hoon.

Doctor ne phir symptoms dismiss kar diye, par ye ghutan career vs sanskar ki ladaai ki wajah se hai jo main roz khud se ladti hoon. Main office ki promotion thukra rahi hoon kyunki log kahenge ki divorced aurat haath se nikal gayi hai aur bacchon par dhyan nahi de rahi. Maa-baap ki parvarish par sawal na uthein, isliye main apni suppressed identity ko smile ke peeche chhupa kar sabki seva karti rehti hoon.

Doctor ne palpitations ko stress kaha, par ye woh darr hai ki agar maine career ke liye stand liya toh khandaan ki shaan mitti mein mil jayegi. Single mother hone ki wajah se pehle hi bohot taane milte hain, isliye main chupchap wahi karti hoon jo ghar wale chahte hain taaki aur kalesh na ho. Unki khushi ke liye maine apne career ka gala ghot diya hai, kyunki mere liye unki izzat meri pehchaan se bohot badi hai.

Doctor ne relax karne ko bola, par unhe nahi pata ki mera suppressed self rishta tootne aur samaj ke darr se bahar nahi aa raha. Main job wapas join nahi kar rahi kyunki mujhe lagta hai ki agar maine aisa kiya toh parivaar ko neighborhood mein neechu dekhna padega. Unka sar uncha rahe, bas isiliye main ek silent homemaker bani hoon jo apni khwahishon ka qatal har din karti hai.
